instance.invitation-mail-body:
invitation -> applicationName -> link -> {{{

Dear Recipient,

You have been invited to create an account for the application {$applicationName}.

To begin the setup process, please open the link and follow the instructions on the website:
{$link}

If you did not expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

Kind regards,
Your {$applicationName} Team

}}}
instance.verification-mail-body:
invitation -> applicationName -> token -> {{{

Dear Recipient,

Please enter the following verification code in the application to continue:
Verification Code: {$token}

This verification code is only valid for a limited time.

If you did not expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

Kind regards,
Your {$applicationName} Team

}}}
